title: The state of the 2023 tech market
description: Gergely Orosz discusses the 2023 tech market landscape, hiring trends, AI's impact on software engineering, the OpenAI leadership crisis, Stack Overflow's uncertain future, and his self-published book 'The Software Engineer's Guidebook.'

you know meaning it's gonna take your your api keys your tokens like that would be bad uh the unfortunate thing is that today most developers who are choosing packages and and going about their day install a couple clicks you get it going and it monitors all your pull requests and you can get accurate and kind of in -depth analysis of all your dependencies really high signal to noise you know it
